sections.paragraph:
κρυσταλλίζω (s. next entry; hapax leg.) shine like crystal, be as transparent as crystal of jasper Rv 21:11.

hapax leg. hapax leg. = hapax legomenon (occurring only once)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 571
